reasons: Lolita can protect allies from Brody's forward-facing ranged pressure and reduce his ability to freely poke.
Brody's damage pattern is more predictable than high-attack-speed marksmen, so shield timing is practical.

proof.summary: Brody wants to land heavy ranged attacks and mark targets, while Lolita can protect from incoming projectile pressure and shield allies during trades.
worksBestWhen: Lolita faces Brody before his damage window.
failureCases: Lolita wastes shield before Brody commits.
Brody's team forces Lolita to turn away.

reasons: Natalia can punish Brody's limited escape options by approaching from fog and forcing close-range burst.
Silence disrupts Brody before he can set up stun, reposition, or finish with ultimate.

proof.summary: Brody wants controlled ranged trades, while Natalia can bypass lane vision, silence him, and burst before he completes his mark-based damage cycle.
worksBestWhen: Natalia attacks after Brody uses mobility or stun.
Natalia approaches through unchecked bush routes.
failureCases: Brody keeps safe spacing with tank protection.
Natalia is revealed before the engage.
Brody survives the first burst and counter-stuns.

reasons: Saber can punish Brody's lack of reliable escape with a targeted burst lock.
Brody is vulnerable when isolated because his damage requires setup through marks and spacing.

proof.summary: Brody wants to control fights through heavy ranged hits, while Saber can force an airborne burst window with Triple Sweep before Brody finishes his damage cycle.
worksBestWhen: Saber waits until Brody's defensive tools or Flicker are unavailable.
Saber has enough damage to finish during the lock window.
failureCases: Brody positions too far behind frontline.

reasons: Wanwan can cleanse Brody's control if timed correctly and keep repositioning around his slower attack rhythm.
Her mobility makes it harder for Brody to repeatedly stack marks on the same target.

proof.summary: Brody wants to land controlled mark stacks and stun pressure, while Wanwan can remove control effects and reposition after attacks.
worksBestWhen: Wanwan saves Needles in Flowers for Brody's stun or control moment.
Wanwan avoids trading while already marked.
failureCases: Brody lands burst before Wanwan can reset spacing.
Brody's team locks Wanwan after her skill 2 is down.

reasons: Chou can isolate Brody and force him out of his preferred firing position.
Brody is threatening when he controls spacing; Chou punishes that by kicking him into team follow-up.

proof.summary: Brody wants to maintain safe attack spacing, while Chou can flank, displace, and isolate him from protection.
worksBestWhen: Chou attacks from side vision or bush.
Brody's Flicker or defensive item is unavailable.
failureCases: Brody survives the kick and counter-stuns.
